serviceNotes.engine oil: CBS oil service MFR 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum with Long-Life oil (SIB B000214 / service display).
serviceNotes.micro filter: Interior filter at every engine oil change (30,000 km CBS ceiling) per garage.wiki F30 LCI.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: Every 2 years after the first change; garage.wiki notes first brake fluid change at 3 years — follow owner’s manual for your market.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Air filter each second engine oil service (60,000 km at 30,000 km oil ceiling) per garage.wiki F30 LCI.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Changed from 90,000 km to 60,000 km: spark plugs with each second engine oil change (garage.wiki F30 LCI, all other modifications).
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: CBS-style front pad inspection; 50,000 km matches newer F3x CBS inspection spacing.
serviceNotes.xDrive transfer case fluid: xDrive only; specialist interval often 60,000–100,000 km.
serviceNotes.differential fluids: xDrive only; specialist interval often 60,000–100,000 km.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct injection: carbon clean ~120,000 km as preventive maintenance.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals) — 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum. https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-lci-f30/2015/service-intervals.html
serviceSources.micro filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-lci-f30/2015/service-intervals.html — interior filter at every engine oil change
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-lci-f30/2015/service-intervals.html — first change 3 years then every 2 years; BMW owner's manual F30 LCI
serviceSources.air cleaner element: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-lci-f30/2015/service-intervals.html — air filter with each second engine oil change (60,000 km)
serviceSources.spark plugs: Changed from 90,000 km to 60,000 km per https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-lci-f30/2015/service-intervals.html — all other modifications: second oil change
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 50,000 km planning interval (F30 LCI CBS)
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 60,000 km planning interval (F30 LCI CBS)
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — vehicle check every second engine oil service (60,000 km)
